message:
test(ftui-runtime): add 34 proptest invariants for cost models

Property-based tests for all three mathematical cost models:
- Cache cost: miss rate bounds, monotonicity, decomposition, budget range
- Pipeline scheduling: utilization formula, stage fractions, stability, sojourn
- Batch cost: optimality, formula verification, edge cases, decomposition

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
